_comment: Pre-populated LLM-derived oracle classifier tag cache (W0-A in /root/.claude/plans/create-some-extremely-verbose-validated-crane.md). Each entry maps a card name to a list of structural tags asserted about its oracle text. Engine/AI code reads tags from this cache via ai.oracle_classifier.load_oracle_tags() instead of regex-matching oracle text at runtime. R4 seed entry: SORCERY_SPEED_LOCKOUT for Teferi-TR + 3 functional analogues. Future waves expand this file via tools/build_oracle_classifier_cache.py; the schema is content-addressed by (card_name, oracle_text) so stale entries invalidate cleanly.
